title: FBSN Exercise

modes.label: Facilitated In-Room
modes.description: Use physical Fact/Belief and Signal/Noise cards with a facilitator guiding the team through the exercise live

modes.label: Virtual Session
modes.description: Host a digital session where the team connects from their devices and votes on each perspective in real time

modes.label: Solo Practice
modes.description: Run the exercise individually to build your own strategic clarity before a team session

outcomes: Alignment on which signals matter most
outputs: Prioritized list of signals to act on

title: Three Horizons Scanning
outcomes: Shared view of current, emerging, and future landscape
Alignment on where to invest attention
outputs: Key shifts and emerging patterns identified

title: Assumption Mapping
description: Based on David Bland's work from Testing Business Ideas

modes.label: Facilitated In-Room
modes.description: Use the digital tool on a shared screen while a facilitator guides the team through brainstorming and mapping assumptions

modes.label: Virtual Session
modes.description: Share the tool screen in a video call and have the team contribute assumptions collaboratively

modes.label: Solo Practice
modes.description: Map assumptions individually to clarify your own thinking before a team session

outcomes: Shared awareness of what the team takes for granted
Clear priorities for what to test first
outputs: Assumption map with importance and evidence ratings
Prioritized list of assumptions to test immediately

title: Future Visioning
outcomes: Compelling shared vision of the future
outputs: Key elements of the desired future state

title: Strategic Ambition Setting
outcomes: Defined strategic boundaries and focus areas

title: Backcasting
outcomes: Clear pathway from future vision to present actions
Identified capability gaps and development needs
outputs: Near-term actions connected to long-term vision

title: The Future Backwards
outputs: Weak signals to monitor that indicate which narrative is unfolding

title: Cynefin Navigator
outcomes: Shared understanding of which domain each challenge belongs to

title: Team Operating System Design
outcomes: Shared language for how the team works
outputs: Meeting rhythms, decision processes, and communication norms
